titles.en: Chapter on What is Said About Those Who Miss Standing at Al-mash'ar
Chapter on What is Said About Those Who Miss Standing at Al-mash'ar

segments: : «مَنْ أَفَاضَ مِنْ عَرَفَاتٍ مَعَ اَلنَّاسِ فَلَمْ يَلْبَثْ مَعَهُمْ بِجَمْعٍ وَ مَضَى إِلَى مِنًى مُتَعَمِّداً أَوْ مُسْتَخِفّاً فَعَلَيْهِ بَدَنَةٌ».
arabic.text: : «مَنْ أَفَاضَ مِنْ عَرَفَاتٍ مَعَ اَلنَّاسِ فَلَمْ يَلْبَثْ مَعَهُمْ بِجَمْعٍ وَ مَضَى إِلَى مِنًى مُتَعَمِّداً أَوْ مُسْتَخِفّاً فَعَلَيْهِ بَدَنَةٌ».

segments:
Hadith.2990 - In a narration from Ali ibn Ri'ab, Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Whoever departs from Arafat with the people but does not stay with them at Jam‘ (Muzdalifah) and deliberately or out of disregard proceeds directly to Mina, must offer a badnah (a camel as expiation)."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2990 - In a narration from Ali ibn Ri'ab, Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Whoever departs from Arafat with the people but does not stay with them at Jam‘ (Muzdalifah) and deliberately or out of disregard proceeds directly to Mina, must offer a badnah (a camel as expiation)."

narratorChain.raw: 2990 -فِي رِوَايَةِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ رِئَابٍ أَنَّ اَلصَّادِقَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

parts.text: 2990 -فِي رِوَايَةِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ رِئَابٍ أَنَّ اَلصَّادِقَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on What is Said About Those Who Miss Standing at Al-mash'ar

segments: : قُلْتُ لَهُ رَجُلٌ أَفَاضَ مِنْ عَرَفَاتٍ فَمَرَّ بِالْمَشْعَرِ فَلَمْ يَقِفْ حَتَّى اِنْتَهَى إِلَى مِنًى فَرَمَى اَلْجَمْرَةَ وَ لَمْ يَعْلَمْ حَتَّى اِرْتَفَعَ اَلنَّهَارُ قَالَ «يَرْجِعُ إِلَى اَلْمَشْعَرِ فَيَقِفُ ثُمَّ يَرْمِي اَلْجَمْرَةَ.
arabic.text: : قُلْتُ لَهُ رَجُلٌ أَفَاضَ مِنْ عَرَفَاتٍ فَمَرَّ بِالْمَشْعَرِ فَلَمْ يَقِفْ حَتَّى اِنْتَهَى إِلَى مِنًى فَرَمَى اَلْجَمْرَةَ وَ لَمْ يَعْلَمْ حَتَّى اِرْتَفَعَ اَلنَّهَارُ قَالَ «يَرْجِعُ إِلَى اَلْمَشْعَرِ فَيَقِفُ ثُمَّ يَرْمِي اَلْجَمْرَةَ.

segments:
Hadith.2991 - Yunus ibn Ya'qub narrated from Abu Abdullah (as):
I said to him: "A man departed from Arafat, passed by Al-Mash'ar (Muzdalifah), but did not stop there until he reached Mina, where he threw the pebbles at the Jamarah. He did not realize this mistake until the day had advanced."
Imam (as) said: "He should return to Al-Mash'ar, stand there, and then return to throw the pebbles at the Jamarah."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2991 - Yunus ibn Ya'qub narrated from Abu Abdullah (as):
I said to him: "A man departed from Arafat, passed by Al-Mash'ar (Muzdalifah), but did not stop there until he reached Mina, where he threw the pebbles at the Jamarah. He did not realize this mistake until the day had advanced."
Imam (as) said: "He should return to Al-Mash'ar, stand there, and then return to throw the pebbles at the Jamarah."

narratorChain.raw: 2991 - وَ رَوَى يُونُسُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on What is Said About Those Who Miss Standing at Al-mash'ar

segments: : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ اَلرَّجُلُ اَلْأَعْمَى وَ اَلْمَرْأَةُ اَلضَّعِيفَةُ يَكُونَانِ مَعَ اَلْجَمَّالِ اَلْأَعْرَابِيِّ فَإِذَا أَفَاضَ بِهِمْ مِنْ عَرَفَاتٍ مَرَّ بِهِمْ كَمَا هُمْ إِلَى مِنًى وَ لَمْ يَنْزِلْ بِهِمْ جَمْعاً فَقَالَ «أَ لَيْسَ قَدْ صَلَّوْا بِهَا فَقَدْ أَجْزَأَهُمْ» قُلْتُ فَإِنْ لَمْ يُصَلُّوا بِهَا قَالَ «ذَكَرُوا اَللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِيهَا فَإِنْ كَانُوا قَدْ ذَكَرُوا اَللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِيهَا فَقَدْ أَجْزَأَهُمْ ».
arabic.text: : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ اَلرَّجُلُ اَلْأَعْمَى وَ اَلْمَرْأَةُ اَلضَّعِيفَةُ يَكُونَانِ مَعَ اَلْجَمَّالِ اَلْأَعْرَابِيِّ فَإِذَا أَفَاضَ بِهِمْ مِنْ عَرَفَاتٍ مَرَّ بِهِمْ كَمَا هُمْ إِلَى مِنًى وَ لَمْ يَنْزِلْ بِهِمْ جَمْعاً فَقَالَ «أَ لَيْسَ قَدْ صَلَّوْا بِهَا فَقَدْ أَجْزَأَهُمْ» قُلْتُ فَإِنْ لَمْ يُصَلُّوا بِهَا قَالَ «ذَكَرُوا اَللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِيهَا فَإِنْ كَانُوا قَدْ ذَكَرُوا اَللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِيهَا فَقَدْ أَجْزَأَهُمْ ».

segments:
Hadith.2992 - Muhammad ibn Hakim narrated:
I said to Abu Abdullah (as): "A blind man and a weak woman are traveling with an Arab camel driver. After departing from Arafat, he takes them directly to Mina without stopping at Jam‘ (Muzdalifah)."
Imam (as) said: "Did they not pray there (at Jam‘)? If so, it suffices for them."
I asked: "What if they did not pray there?"
Imam (as) replied: "If they remembered Allah (swt), the Almighty, while there, then it suffices for them."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2992 - Muhammad ibn Hakim narrated:
I said to Abu Abdullah (as): "A blind man and a weak woman are traveling with an Arab camel driver. After departing from Arafat, he takes them directly to Mina without stopping at Jam‘ (Muzdalifah)."
Imam (as) said: "Did they not pray there (at Jam‘)? If so, it suffices for them."
I asked: "What if they did not pray there?"
Imam (as) replied: "If they remembered Allah (swt), the Almighty, while there, then it suffices for them."

narratorChain.raw: 2992 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ حَكِيمٍ قَالَ
